task_summaries.task_scope: Compare stability of near-constant feature values across multiple time slices within the capture period to detect temporal variability.
Assess class-conditioned distribution shifts for near-constant features to evaluate their differentiation potential across classes.
Evaluate feature cardinality and detect subtle fluctuations below coarse aggregation levels to identify hidden variability in near-constant features.
Check correlation between near-constant features and known network events or measurement flags to distinguish stable network behavior from measurement artifacts.
